packs.title: Kidcore Kraft
packs.agent_style_hints: Use wonky, hand-drawn-feeling typography. Embrace asymmetry and imperfection. Bold marker-style outlines. Stars, smileys, hearts in childlike forms.
packs.research_basis: Kittl 2026 graphic design trend report identifies 'Kidcore' as a breakout aesthetic — crayons, stickers, naive shapes, intentionally imperfect. A direct rebellion against polished minimalism.

packs.title: Y2K Chrome
packs.agent_style_hints: Bubble lettering, chrome/gradient effects, butterfly motifs, star and heart icons, early-2000s pop optimism. Use translucent overlapping shapes.
packs.research_basis: RareCustom and CarStickers 2026 trend reports both flag Y2K as one of the dominant sticker design trends. Resonates dual-generationally — Gen Z discovering, millennials nostalgic.

packs.title: Coquette Bow
packs.agent_style_hints: Hand-drawn cursive script feel. Lowercase italic. Bow motifs, lace silhouettes, delicate hearts. Soft pinks and creams. Avoid uppercase — keep it whispered.
packs.research_basis: Knitwear.io and Aesthetic BK 2026 reports both list Coquette as a dominant Gen Z/teen aesthetic, often blended with the breakout 'Social Club' preppy-bows trend.

packs.title: Cottage Forager
packs.agent_style_hints: Hand-drawn ferns, pressed flower silhouettes, mushroom motifs. Woodcut-style typography or soft serif. Lowercase periods for grounded calm. Earth tones only.
packs.research_basis: Tapstitch 2026 Gen Z report describes Cottagecore as 'a mindset, not just an aesthetic — a way of slowing down.' Steady-state strong, not faddish.

packs.title: Bonbon Drop
packs.agent_style_hints: Glossy 3D effect using radial gradients (white highlight upper-left). Pastels only. Heart, star, candy motifs. Cute kawaii faces. High shine, soft borders.
packs.research_basis: Vogue Japan and Tamago Daruma both report a massive 2026 sticker boom in Japan — 70% of elementary kids actively collect stickers, with Bonbon Drop and Heisei Retro aesthetics at the center. Cross-generational appeal (parents + kids together).

packs.title: Doomscroll Diaries
packs.agent_style_hints: Tongue-in-cheek typography. Speech-bubble framings, screenshot aesthetics, monospace fonts mixed with serif. Pessimistic-optimistic energy. Don't try to be cool — be ironic about trying.
packs.research_basis: CarStickers 2026 trend report explicitly identified 'wellness fatigue' driving a surge in chaotic humor stickers. Forbes data: 67% of Americans feel wellness culture is too pressuring. Teens use this as taste-signaling through irony.

packs.title: Steady Hand
packs.tagline: Coastal heritage for the anchor mom
packs.agent_style_hints: Vintage hand-drawn illustration feel. Maritime motifs (anchor, wave, lighthouse) used sparingly. Weathered copper for warmth. Italic lowercase serif for tender phrases. Calm and grounded — not cute.
packs.research_basis: Pantone's 2026 Color of the Year is 'Transformative Teal'. Darling & May's 2026 Mother's Day Edit identified Coastal Heritage as one of the year's four breakout Mother's Day aesthetics.

packs.title: Bloom Lines
packs.agent_style_hints: Soft watercolor wash backgrounds. Single continuous line drawings for portraits or florals. Italic serif for handwritten feel. Dusty rose, lavender, sage. Negative space is part of the design.
packs.research_basis: Greetopia 2026 card trend report and Accio Mother's Day card design report both highlight watercolor florals and minimalist line-art portraits as the two leading 2026 Mother's Day card aesthetics.

rollout_recommendation.rationale: Ship 2 packs alongside the original 12 generic presets at MVP launch — Bonbon Drop has the broadest cross-age appeal, Bloom Lines is timed for May 10. Releasing one pack every 2 weeks post-launch creates a return-to-app rhythm and lets you A/B which themes drive the most sticker creation. Steady Hand is held for next year's Mother's Day cycle to avoid splitting attention with Bloom Lines in the same season.
